address: University Road, Charbagh, Swat, KPK, Pakistan
about: The University of Swat (UoS) is a public research university located in Charbagh, Swat, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan. Established in 2001, the university strives to provide quality higher education to the people of Swat and surrounding regions. It offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across disciplines including Computer Science, Management Sciences, Pharmacy, Natural Sciences, Humanities, and Social Sciences.
vision: To become a world-class institution of higher learning contributing to knowledge, innovation, and sustainable development.
mission: To provide quality education, promote research, and cultivate ethical leadership for serving society.

programs.name: BS Computer Science
programs.eligibility: FSc (Pre-Engineering or Pre-Medical or ICS) with minimum 50% marks or equivalent
programs.description: A comprehensive program covering software development, algorithms, artificial intelligence, data structures, databases, networking, and systems. Prepares graduates for software engineering, data science, and tech industry roles.

programs.name: BS Software Engineering
programs.eligibility: FSc with minimum 50% marks or ICS
programs.description: Focuses on engineering principles applied to software development, including project management, software quality assurance, agile methodologies, and system design.

programs.name: MS Computer Science
programs.eligibility: BS CS or equivalent with minimum CGPA 2.5
programs.description: Advanced studies in computing, research methodology, and specialized areas like machine learning, cloud computing, and cybersecurity.

programs.name: BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration)
programs.description: Prepares students for leadership roles in business and management, covering marketing, finance, HR, entrepreneurship, and organizational behaviour.

programs.name: MBA (Master of Business Administration)
programs.eligibility: BBA or 16-year education with minimum 45% marks
programs.description: Advanced management studies with specializations in finance, marketing, and human resource management.

programs.name: BS English
programs.description: A literature and linguistics program developing language skills, critical thinking, and cultural understanding for careers in education, media, and corporate sectors.

programs.name: BS Pharmacy (Pharm-D)
programs.description: A professional pharmacy degree preparing students for careers as pharmacists in clinical, industrial, and community settings.

programs.name: BS Mathematics
programs.eligibility: FSc (Pre-Engineering or Pre-Medical) with minimum 50% marks
programs.description: Covers pure and applied mathematics, statistics, and mathematical modelling for careers in academia, finance, and research.

programs.name: BS Physics
programs.eligibility: FSc (Pre-Engineering or Pre-Medical) with minimum 50% marks
programs.description: Theoretical and experimental physics program covering classical mechanics, quantum physics, thermodynamics, and electromagnetism.

programs.name: BS Chemistry
programs.eligibility: FSc (Pre-Medical or Pre-Engineering) with minimum 50% marks
programs.description: Covers organic, inorganic, physical, and analytical chemistry. Excellent preparation for pharmaceutical, industrial, and research careers.

admissions.process: 1. Check eligibility for your desired program. 2. Fill the online application form at admissions.uswat.edu.pk. 3. Pay the application processing fee (Rs. 1000) via bank challan. 4. Submit the printed form with attested documents (Matric certificate, FSc/FA certificate, CNIC/B-Form copy, 4 passport photos) to the Admissions Office. 5. Appear in the University Entry Test. 6. Check the merit list and report for enrollment.

fees.note: Fee structure is subject to change. Scholarships and financial aid are available for deserving students.

scholarships: University Merit Scholarships for top students

centers: Centre for Peace and Development Studies

notable_facts: University of Swat is one of the fastest-growing public universities in KPK.
The university is HEC recognized and ranked.
It has produced thousands of graduates serving in government, corporate, and academic sectors.
The campus is spread over 350+ acres in the scenic Swat Valley.
The university offers free Wi-Fi across the campus.
A dedicated transport service is available for students from Mingora and surrounding areas.
